name: Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Sheraton Grand Danang Beach (Sheraton Grand Danang Beach Resort & Spa)
address: 35 Truong Sa Street, Ngu Hanh Son Ward, Danang City, Vietnam, Hòa Hải, Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam
description:
Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach - Điểm đến lý tưởng bên bờ biển xinh đẹp

Nằm cách trung tâm thành phố Đà Nẵng chỉ 12 km và cách sân bay quốc tế khoảng 25 phút lái xe, Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach là nơi lý tưởng để bạn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ thư thái bên bờ biển tuyệt đẹp. Khách sạn được xây dựng vào năm 2018, mang đến không gian hiện đại, sang trọng cùng các tiện nghi đẳng cấp, phù hợp cho cả gia đình và du khách muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp của miền Trung Việt Nam.

Với chính sách linh hoạt dành cho trẻ em, Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach cho phép trẻ từ 1 đến 11 tuổi lưu trú miễn phí, giúp gia đình có thể thoải mái tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ mà không lo về chi phí thêm. Thời gian nhận phòng bắt đầu từ 3 giờ chiều, và khách hàng cần trả phòng trước 12 giờ trưa để đảm bảo dịch vụ chu đáo và thuận tiện cho mọi khách lưu trú. Đây chắc chắn là địa điểm nghỉ dưỡng lý tưởng để thư giãn và khám phá vẻ đẹp của Đà Nẵng.

Trải Nghiệm Giải Trí Đẳng Cấp tại Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach

Ngoài ra, Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach còn thường xuyên tổ chức các sự kiện đặc biệt và chương trình giải trí hấp dẫn tại quầy bar, mang đến những trải nghiệm mới mẻ và sôi động cho du khách. Các buổi biểu diễn âm nhạc trực tiếp, DJ chơi nhạc sôi động hay các buổi tối chủ đề đều góp phần tạo nên không khí vui tươi, năng động ngay trong khuôn viên khu nghỉ dưỡng. Đây chính là nơi lý tưởng để thư giãn, giao lưu và tận hưởng những khoảnh khắc đáng nhớ trong chuyến đi của bạn tại Đà Nẵng.

Tiện Nghi Tiện Ích Đẳng Cấp tại Khu Nghỉ Dưỡng & Spa Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng hoàn hảo với các tiện nghi hiện đại và tiện ích đa dạng. Du khách có thể tận hưởng dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, đảm bảo mọi nhu cầu của bạn luôn được đáp ứng bất kể thời gian nào trong ngày. Ngoài ra, dịch vụ phòng, dịch vụ giặt ủi hàng ngày và két an toàn cá nhân giúp khách hàng cảm thấy yên tâm và thoải mái trong suốt kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Để mang lại sự tiện lợi tối đa, khách còn có thể truy cập vào phòng chờ Executive Lounge cao cấp, nơi cung cấp các dịch vụ đặc biệt và không gian thư giãn sang trọng. Dịch vụ hỗ trợ khách hàng như dịch vụ trông giữ hành lý, dịch vụ trông giữ an toàn và dịch vụ lễ tân tận tình của đội ngũ concierge giúp chuyến đi của bạn trở nên dễ dàng và thuận tiện hơn bao giờ hết. Tất cả những tiện ích này đều góp phần tạo nên một kỳ nghỉ đẳng cấp và trọn vẹn tại Đà Nẵng.

Tiện Nghi Về Giao Thông Tại Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach mang đến sự thuận tiện tối đa cho khách hàng với dịch vụ thuê xe hơi chuyên nghiệp, giúp quý khách dễ dàng khám phá vẻ đẹp của thành phố Đà Nẵng cũng như các địa điểm lân cận một cách linh hoạt và thoải mái. Dịch vụ này phù hợp cho những ai muốn tự do khám phá mà không bị ràng buộc bởi lịch trình cố định. Bên cạnh đó, khách lưu trú còn có thể yên tâm về chỗ đậu xe khi sử dụng dịch vụ đỗ xe tại chỗ, đảm bảo an toàn và thuận tiện cho các phương tiện của mình trong suốt thời gian lưu lại tại resort.

Tiện Nghi Phòng Nghỉ Sang Trọng tại Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach

Tại Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach, mỗi phòng nghỉ được trang bị đầy đủ các tiện nghi cao cấp nhằm mang đến trải nghiệm thoải mái và thư giãn tối đa cho khách. Bạn có thể tận hưởng không khí mát mẻ từ hệ thống điều hòa, cùng với bộ đồ ngủ bathrobes sang trọng. Các phòng còn có ban công hoặc sân thượng riêng để bạn thư giãn ngắm cảnh, đi kèm với cửa sổ rèm chắn sáng giúp giữ cho không gian luôn yên tĩnh và dễ chịu.

Trong phòng, khách sẽ tìm thấy truyền hình vệ tinh/cáp, tủ lạnh, minibar và máy pha cà phê/trà để thưởng thức đồ uống yêu thích bất cứ lúc nào. Ngoài ra, các tiện nghi như máy sấy tóc, đồ dùng vệ sinh cá nhân cao cấp, nước đóng chai miễn phí, báo hàng ngày và các bộ dụng cụ vệ sinh đầy đủ giúp khách cảm thấy như đang ở nhà. Phòng còn có phòng khách riêng biệt, mang lại không gian riêng tư để thư giãn hoặc làm việc, cùng các rèm chắn sáng giúp tạo nên không gian nghỉ ngơi lý tưởng.

Trải Nghiệm Ẩm Thực Đẳng Cấp Tại Khu Nghỉ Dưỡng & Spa Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach mang đến trải nghiệm ẩm thực đa dạng và tiện nghi với dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, giúp quý khách có thể thưởng thức các món ăn yêu thích bất cứ lúc nào trong ngày. Thư giãn tại quầy cà phê sang trọng, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức những ly cà phê thơm ngon cùng các đồ uống nhẹ nhàng trong không gian ấm cúng. Ngoài ra, khách còn có thể tận hưởng dịch vụ phòng tận nơi, đảm bảo mọi nhu cầu ẩm thực đều được đáp ứng nhanh chóng và tiện lợi.

Không chỉ dừng lại ở đó, khu nghỉ dưỡng còn trang bị các tiện nghi BBQ để khách có thể tổ chức những bữa tiệc ngoài trời đầy sôi động và hấp dẫn. Đội ngũ nhân viên dọn phòng hàng ngày luôn đảm bảo không gian nghỉ dưỡng của bạn luôn sạch sẽ, thoải mái. Với sự kết hợp hoàn hảo giữa dịch vụ tiện ích và không gian thoáng đãng, Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach cam kết mang đến cho bạn trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời trong suối nghỉ dưỡng đẳng cấp.

Trải Nghiệm Đa Dạng Các Loại Phòng Tại Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach mang đến cho du khách nhiều lựa chọn phòng đa dạng, phù hợp với mọi nhu cầu và sở thích. Bạn có thể chọn những phòng guest room với 1 giường King hoặc 2 giường Twin, tất cả đều có diện tích 47 mét vuông và hướng nhìn ra hồ bơi hoặc vịnh, mang lại cảm giác thư thái và riêng tư. Ngoài ra, các phòng partial sea view cũng mang đến tầm nhìn đẹp mắt ra biển, giúp bạn tận hưởng vẻ đẹp của thiên nhiên ngay trong tầm mắt.
Đối với những nhóm khách hoặc gia đình, khách sạn còn có các suite và phòng liên thông như 1 Bedroom Suite, 2 Bedroom Connecting Suite, hay Presidential Suite, với diện tích từ 96 đến 270 mét vuông, mang đến không gian rộng rãi, sang trọng và tiện nghi. Đặc biệt, các phòng này còn có các góc nhìn tuyệt đẹp từ ban công, giúp bạn thư giãn và tận hưởng khung cảnh biển, vịnh hay vườn cây xanh mát.
Đặt phòng trực tiếp qua Agoda không chỉ giúp bạn nhận được mức giá tốt nhất mà còn mang lại trải nghiệm đặt phòng dễ dàng, nhanh chóng và không gây phiền hà. Với hệ thống đặt phòng tin cậy và dịch vụ hỗ trợ tận tình, bạn sẽ yên tâm chuẩn bị cho kỳ nghỉ lý tưởng tại Đà Nẵng.

Khám Phá Vùng Đất Hòa Hải Đầy Nắng và Gió tại Đà Nẵng

Hòa Hải là một khu vực ven biển tuyệt đẹp nằm phía Nam của thành phố Đà Nẵng, nổi bật với bãi biển dài trắng mịn, nước biển trong xanh và không khí trong lành. Nơi đây lý tưởng để thư giãn, tắm nắng hoặc tham gia các hoạt động thể thao dưới nước như lướt sóng, chèo thuyền kayak và lặn biển, mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng hoàn hảo cho du khách. Không chỉ có bãi biển tuyệt đẹp, Hòa Hải còn nổi bật với các khu resort cao cấp, nhà hàng sang trọng và các dịch vụ giải trí đa dạng, tạo nên một không gian nghỉ dưỡng đẳng cấp và thoải mái.

Hướng Dẫn Di Chuyển Từ Sân Bay Đà Nẵng Đến Khu Nghỉ Dưỡng & Spa Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach

Chỉ cách trung tâm thành phố Đà Nẵng khoảng 10 km, Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach dễ dàng tiếp cận từ Sân bay Quốc tế Đà Nẵng. Khi vừa bước xuống sân bay, du khách có thể lựa chọn dịch vụ taxi hoặc xe đưa đón riêng để di chuyển trực tiếp đến khu nghỉ dưỡng trong vòng khoảng 20-30 phút, tùy thuộc vào lưu lượng giao thông. Ngoài ra, nhiều dịch vụ xe đưa đón của khách sạn cũng có sẵn để đặt trước, giúp bạn yên tâm về việc di chuyển và tiết kiệm thời gian.

Nếu bạn muốn trải nghiệm phương tiện công cộng, có thể bắt xe buýt từ sân bay đến trung tâm thành phố rồi chuyển sang taxi hoặc xe ôm để đến khu nghỉ dưỡng. Tuy nhiên, phương án này phù hợp hơn nếu bạn đi cùng nhóm nhỏ hoặc mang nhiều hành lý. Dù lựa chọn phương tiện nào, hành trình từ sân bay đến Sheraton Đà Nẵng đều thuận tiện và nhanh chóng, giúp bạn có thể bắt đầu kỳ nghỉ dưỡng của mình một cách dễ dàng và thoải mái.

Khám Phá Các Địa Danh Nổi Tiếng Gần Khu Nghỉ Dưỡng Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach

Tọa lạc tại vị trí thuận tiện, Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach mang đến cho du khách cơ hội khám phá những danh lam thắng cảnh nổi bật của thành phố Đà Nẵng. Chỉ cách vài phút đi bộ, Ngũ Hành Sơn huyền bí với những hang động kỳ vĩ và các tượng đá nghệ thuật độc đáo là điểm đến lý tưởng để khám phá vẻ đẹp thiên nhiên và văn hóa địa phương. Bãi biển Non Nước xinh đẹp, với cát trắng mịn và làn nước trong xanh, mang đến không gian lý tưởng để thư giãn và tận hưởng vẻ đẹp của biển cả.

Ngoài ra, du khách còn có thể ghé thăm các sân golf danh tiếng như Sân Golf VinaCapital và Sân Golf Montgomerie Links, nơi hội tụ những thử thách đỉnh cao dành cho những người yêu thích môn thể thao này. Đối diện là Bệnh viện Phụ sản - Nhi Đà Nẵng, mang lại sự an tâm về y tế trong trường hợp cần thiết. Không chỉ thế, khu chợ sầm uất gần đó là nơi lý tưởng để trải nghiệm ẩm thực đặc trưng và mua sắm các mặt hàng thủ công mỹ nghệ độc đáo như Đá mỹ nghệ Tư Hùng. Những địa danh này góp phần làm phong phú thêm trải nghiệm của du khách khi lưu trú tại Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach nằm gần nhiều nhà hàng đa dạng, phù hợp với mọi khẩu vị. Bạn có thể thưởng thức ẩm thực đặc sắc tại Si Dining Restaurant hoặc trải nghiệm không gian ấm cúng tại Hoas Place. Đối với những ai yêu thích hải sản, Nhà hàng Hải sản Cá Chuồn Cồ là điểm đến lý tưởng để thưởng thức các món hải sản tươi ngon. Nếu muốn thưởng thức ẩm thực Ý đậm đà, Osteria Al Mare sẽ làm hài lòng thực khách. Bên cạnh đó, Baguette mang đến các loại bánh mì và đồ ngọt hấp dẫn, trong khi Brown Bean Coffee là nơi lý tưởng để thưởng thức cà phê thơm ngon. Những trải nghiệm ẩm thực đa dạng còn có thể tìm thấy tại Danabeach, Don Cipriani's, Jazz & Bar, và Nhà hàng & Bar Laluna, mang đến các món ăn ngon và không gian thư giãn tuyệt vời ngay gần khách sạn.

Các địa điểm mua sắm gần Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach

Khách lưu trú tại Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach sẽ dễ dàng tiếp cận nhiều địa điểm mua sắm độc đáo và nổi bật trong khu vực. Bạn có thể ghé thăm các cửa hàng trang sức Namaka để tìm kiếm những món đồ trang sức tinh xảo hoặc tham quan Cơ sở sản xuất đá Mỹ nghệ Thủy Hòa và Cửa hàng đá Mỹ nghệ Tý Ngọc để khám phá những tác phẩm nghệ thuật đá độc đáo. Làng đá mỹ nghệ Non Nước là nơi lý tưởng để mua sắm các sản phẩm thủ công mỹ nghệ truyền thống, trong khi Cơ sở Điêu khắc Đá Mỹ nghệ Xuất Ánh và Tiên Hiếu mang đến những tác phẩm điêu khắc đá tinh xảo. Đặc biệt, Cơ sở Điêu khắc đá mỹ nghệ còn là điểm đến hấp dẫn dành cho những ai yêu thích nghệ thuật điêu khắc đá truyền thống của địa phương.

Giá phòng tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach so với trung bình thành phố

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach nổi bật với mức giá phòng từ 151 đến 200 USD, cao hơn đáng kể so với mức trung bình của các khách sạn tại Đà Nẵng, chỉ từ 51 đến 75 USD. Điều này phản ánh chất lượng dịch vụ cao cấp, tiện nghi sang trọng và trải nghiệm đẳng cấp mà khách hàng có thể mong đợi khi lưu trú tại đây. Với mức giá này, Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach hướng đến những du khách tìm kiếm sự đẳng cấp và dịch vụ hoàn hảo trong kỳ nghỉ của mình. Trong khi đó, các khách sạn trung bình trong thành phố thường phù hợp với ngân sách hạn chế hơn, nhưng vẫn mang lại trải nghiệm thoải mái và tiện nghi đầy đủ.

Nhận Xét Tích Cực về Khu Nghỉ Dưỡng & Spa Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach

Khách hàng đều dành lời khen ngợi về đội ngũ nhân viên thân thiện và nhiệt tình của khách sạn, tạo cảm giác chào đón và thoải mái ngay từ lần đầu tiên đặt chân đến. Hồ bơi tuyệt đẹp và dịch vụ chu đáo là những điểm cộng nổi bật, mang lại trải nghiệm thư giãn tối đa cho khách. Các phòng nghỉ tại đây rộng rãi, sạch sẽ, rất thoải mái và trang trí đẹp mắt, đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của du khách. Không chỉ vậy, khung cảnh resort còn rất đẹp và ấn tượng, khiến ai cũng muốn quay trở lại lần nữa. Với dịch vụ xuất sắc và không gian đẳng cấp, Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach thực sự là điểm đến lý tưởng để nghỉ dưỡng và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời.

Đánh Giá Tích Cực Về Khu Nghỉ Dưỡng & Spa Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach nhận được đánh giá rất cao từ khách hàng về chất lượng dịch vụ và trải nghiệm tổng thể. Điểm số trung bình 8.9 phản ánh sự hài lòng về mọi khía cạnh của khách lưu trú, từ cơ sở vật chất hiện đại đến dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp của đội ngũ nhân viên. Các tiện ích tại đây được đánh giá cao với điểm số 9.0, mang đến không gian nghỉ dưỡng tiện nghi, sang trọng và thoải mái cho khách du lịch.

Ngoài ra, sự sạch sẽ và vệ sinh tại khách sạn đạt điểm 9.4, giúp du khách cảm thấy yên tâm và thư thái trong suốt kỳ nghỉ của mình. Mặc dù vị trí có thể không phải là điểm mạnh nhất với điểm số 7.9, nhưng dịch vụ khách hàng và hiệu quả làm việc của nhân viên lại rất ấn tượng, đạt 9.3, góp phần tạo nên trải nghiệm tích cực và đáng nhớ cho mọi khách hàng khi lựa chọn Sheraton Grand Đà Nẵng Beach làm điểm dừng chân lý tưởng tại thành phố biển xinh đẹp này.

sample_comments.text:
Bể bơi lớn nhất được kết nối với biển ở Đà Nẵng! Tuyệt vời!
Phòng rộng rãi và thoải mái đã được chuẩn bị rất đẹp cho lễ kỷ niệm, bữa sáng đa dạng, chất lượng cao, một ly rượu vang ở sảnh, sự hòa quyện hoàn hảo giữa ẩm thực Việt Nam và Ý, cùng với nhà hàng hải sản vào buổi tối, spa sạch sẽ và có tay nghề tốt - trong 3 ngày chúng tôi đã đủ thoải mái nghỉ ngơi trong khách sạn mà không cần ra ngoài.
Cà phê Việt Nam, món ăn Việt Nam, đồ Ý, hải sản, rượu vang, bia đều có ở đây nên tôi khuyên bạn không nên ra ngoài mà hãy thưởng thức tại chỗ!

Trong thời gian chúng tôi lưu trú, tôi xin gửi lời cảm ơn chân thành đến quản lý lễ tân - Phương, quản lý F&B - Nguyễn Đăng, và đầu bếp điều hành - Matteo Boifava đã luôn chu đáo và chăm sóc chúng tôi một cách ấm áp.
Đây là khách sạn tuyệt nhất! Chúng tôi chắc chắn sẽ quay lại khách sạn này mỗi khi đến Đà Nẵng.
Đã đến lúc... tôi đã nhớ nơi đó rồi~

It means so much to hear that you were able to fully unwind and enjoy your entire holiday within the comfort of the resort.

Your kind recognition of Phương, Nguyen Dang, and Executive Chef Matteo Boifava is deeply appreciated. We will be very proud to share your compliments with them, as they are truly passionate about creating memorable experiences for our guests.

Thank you once again for choosing our hotel for your special getaway. Knowing that you already miss the resort is the greatest compliment we could receive.

sample_comments.text: Chỗ nghỉ giá cả hợp lý, tiện nghi và nhân viên thân thiện. Bữa sáng và khu vườn được trang bị đầy đủ, tiện nghi phòng và chỗ đậu xe cũng đủ thoải mái. Tình trạng vệ sinh của chỗ nghỉ rất sạch sẽ, và nhân viên cũng thân thiện, giúp tôi có những khoảng thời gian thoải mái. Vị trí có phần chưa được như mong đợi và môi trường mua sắm không đạt yêu cầu nhưng nhìn chung, đây là một sự lựa chọn giá cả hợp lý.
sample_comments.title: 5 sao cấp độ chuẩn mực

sample_comments.title: Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives:
Bể bơi rất dài, đẹp và thực sự thỏa mái. Nhân viên nhiệt tình, lễ phép. Dịch vụ của khách sạn rất tốt. Phòng tiện nghi, sạch, điều hòa lạnh, có ban công rộng. Bữa sáng nhiều món, ngon.
Setup phòng đón khách rất chu đáo và tận tâm khi có cả quà, hoa xếp chữ và welcome note được viết tay bởi Phuong Vo, Front Office Manager

sample_comments.text: Bạn có thể chơi golf tại Legend Danang Golf với mức giá cho khách lưu trú và cách sân golf khoảng 5 phút đi xe. Bữa sáng buffet cũng rất phong phú, và bạn có thể tận hưởng không khí của khu nghỉ dưỡng với hồ bơi vô cực, các nhân viên đều rất thân thiện. Tuy nhiên, một điểm khó khăn là phải mất khoảng 30 phút đi xe để đến trung tâm thành phố.
sample_comments.title: Nếu bạn chơi golf, thì nên thử.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Yumiko,

Thank you very much for your wonderful review and recommendation. We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed the special golfer benefits, our breakfast buffet, infinity pool, and the overall resort atmosphere. It's also great to know that our team's hospitality made your stay even more enjoyable.

We truly appreciate your feedback regarding the distance to the city center. While our beachfront location offers a peaceful and relaxing resort experience close to the golf course, we understand that traveling into the city may take additional time for some guests.

Thank you once again for staying with us, and we hope to welcome you back for another relaxing golf getaway in the future.

Best Regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Beach Resort & SPA Team

sample_comments.title: Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Chỗ nghỉ thoáng mát, bể bơi rộng, đồ ăn sáng phong phú. Có cơ hội sẽ quay lại

sample_comments.text:
Tôi đã đặt phòng BayView nhưng đã được nâng cấp lên PoolView. Bay view hơi nhàm chán một chút, còn Pool view thì có thể ngắm mặt trời mọc nên rất tuyệt. 
Không khí chung rất yên tĩnh, tôi đã có những phút giây thư giãn. Chăn ga thì thoải mái hơn nhiều so với các khách sạn 5 sao khác. Bữa sáng thì không có gì để chê, cực kỳ ngon. 
Trong 8 ngày ở khách sạn 5 sao, tôi đã ở nhiều nơi và tôi rất muốn quay lại Sheraton. 
Gần như không có người Hàn Quốc. 
Khách sạn 5 sao khác là Hyatt thì có rất nhiều người Hàn Quốc. 
Điều đáng tiếc là nếu hồ bơi được quản lý tốt hơn (chất lượng nước, sửa chữa đáy hồ, độ sâu nước quá thấp) thì sẽ tuyệt vời hơn. 
Thành phố thì cách xa một chút, các bạn hãy lưu ý.

We hope to welcome you back to Sheraton again soon. 

Warm regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Beach Resort & SPA Team

sample_comments.title: Bình thường
sample_comments.positives: hồ bơi
sample_comments.negatives: nhân viên dọn phòng không sạch.

sample_comments.text:
Nhân viên rất tốt bụng và thân thiện, có cảm giác đã được đào tạo tốt trong khách sạn. 
Giường ngủ thoải mái và cả giường gấp cũng ổn. 
Hồ bơi rất lớn, không biết làm thế nào để quản lý nhưng rất sạch sẽ, có vẻ do nhiệt độ ngoài trời cao nên nhiệt độ nước hồ bơi cũng ấm, tôi thấy thật tuyệt khi có trẻ nhỏ chơi lâu ở đó. 
Khu vui chơi trẻ em trong hồ bơi cũng rất được trẻ thích. 
Cát biển trước khu nghỉ dưỡng mềm mại và sóng không quá mạnh nên nhìn có vẻ tốt cho việc tắm biển. 
Bữa sáng có nhiều món đa dạng và ngon, khiến tôi ăn quá nhiều từ sáng, ghế trẻ em trong nhà hàng bữa sáng cũng chắc chắn và tốt. 
Chi phí khách sạn không phải ít ở Việt Nam nhưng tôi rất hài lòng và muốn sử dụng lại lần nữa.
sample_comments.title: Thật sự rất thích.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Eunyeong,

Warm greetings from Sheraton Grand Danang Beach Resort & SPA Team,

Thank you so much for choosing to stay with us and for sharing such a detailed and heartwarming review.

We are truly delighted to know that you had a wonderful experience and appreciated so many aspects of your stay - from the warmth and professionalism of our staff to the comfort of our rooms, the cleanliness and size of the pool, and the family-friendly facilities throughout the resort. We're especially happy to hear your child enjoyed the kids' water playground, and that our beach and breakfast offerings added to your overall satisfaction.

Your kind words mean a great deal to our team and serve as great encouragement as we continue striving to deliver memorable experiences for every guest.

We sincerely look forward to welcoming you and your family back for another enjoyable and relaxing stay in the near future.

Thank you once again and best regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Beach Resort & SPA Team

sample_comments.title: Tốt
sample_comments.positives: Bãi biển sạch và đẹp, hồ bơi lớn và sạch. Nhân viên phục vụ rất vui vẻ và nhiệt tình. Ăn sáng đa dạng và ngon.
sample_comments.negatives:
- Phát sinh phí bắt buộc rất vô lý, nhưng đã tới nhận phòng rồi thì đành phải chấp nhận nhưng không hài lòng. Cụ thể tôi thuê 2 phòng giống như nhau, 1 phòng cho 2 người giá 18 triệu và 1 phòng cho 3 người giá 22 triệu (trên booking và mail đều thể hiện phòng dành cho 3 người), nhưng khi đến khách sạn bắt phụ thu thêm 4 triệu cho người thứ 3 nữa, có nghĩa là tôi phải đóng cho người thứ 3 này 2 lần phí (khi đặt booking và khi nhận phòng tạ resort). Thực ra, nếu rõ ràng thì tôi chỉ cần đặt 2 phòng như nhau cho 2 người/ phòng với giá 18 triêu/ phòng, sau đó khi nhận phòng tôi chỉ trả thêm 4tr phụ thu người thứ 3 thôi
- Có nhiều phí linh tinh phát sinh không đáng với resort cao cấp như vầy (như ra hồ bơi mượn phao chụp hình vài phút cũng tính phí, khu vui chơi trẻ em có vài trò chơi cũng tính phí như tô tượng,...), chi phí nhỏ thôi nhưng rất phiền phức và không vui khi đi đâu cũng thấy phí. Với tầm cỡ resort này thì nên bao gồm trong giá luôn như các khách sạn, resort ngang tầm để khách thoải mái hơn.
=> Mặc dù tốt nhưng sẽ không quay lại vì các resort khác ngang tầm rất nhiều và không phải phiền phức khi chi phí linh tinh phát sinh

sample_comments.text: Hotel location is far from the city and places of interest. There is no convenient store and shop nearby hotel. As for facilities wise, nice swimming pool and private beach. Poor light lit up at night along the footpath between lobby and room. But I am really unhappy with the check in and check out process. The staff are very slow. sample_comments.title: Comfortable but disappointing and needs improvement across various areas
sample_comments.positives:
The long pool is very impressive, and the staff very helpful and (mostly) very accommodating. 
The kids area is well stocked and nicely air conditioned. 
The beach bar "Ortus" next to the hotel (not part of the hotel) was amazing
sample_comments.negatives:
The resort is starting to show its age with wear and tear evident in a lot of places. 
When we stayed, the resort was almost empty. Which when combined with its isolated location 20 mins out of Da Nang felt rather lonely. 

Sitting in its huge restaurants with only 3 other guests and no background music was a little depressing. My wife was keen to try Vietnamese pancakes but the restaurant told us it's for "room service only", despite the restaurant being totally empty. A 5* hotel should have made an exception here. 

The bar (Mix bar) as advertised on the website is closed down and abandoned, same with the pool bar. A 5* hotel with no dedicated bar (ordering drinks in the restaurant doesn't count) is not acceptable. 

The toilets by the children's splash pool smelled incredibly strongly of urine like a public toilet in a park. Again not acceptable in a 5* hotel 

The "bay view" actually overlooks a sandy wasteland, not worth the upgrade.

Warm regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Resort Team

sample_comments.text:
We stayed in Suite room from 22 July, and it was the second time we stayed in Sheraton Da Nang so we knew what to expect. However, this time we were very disappointed with how the staff has been. Sheraton in Da Nang must be the only resort we have ever been could not help the guests to post a postcard. Not coming back

sample_comments.title: Relaxing stay at a luxurious resort
sample_comments.positives:
Granted us an earlier check in and a later checkout to accodmate flight schedule - which was great 
Kids had a lot of fun at the kids club and also at the painting area 
We enjoyed the main pool by the beach
Great options for breakfast 
Clean room with great views
sample_comments.negatives:
First room given to us didnt have a functioning AC , the hotel sent technicians who didn't do anything and said the AC worked when it clearly didn't. We had two rooms and the bedroom AC was cool while the living room was hot. Hotel then offered us a fan which I didn't agree to. They eventually changed our rooms and the stay was much smoother after. 

Kids pool area seemed a bit dated and could use an update.

sample_comments.title: Quality of Food
sample_comments.text: Pathetic is the only word appropriate for the food served at breakfast or at any restaurants. At breakfast, the staff at counters don't smile - as if they are tired and frustrated. We were served Vegetarian Ban Mi with Pork in it and thankfully we checked before eating it. What was appalling is the argument by the staff at the counter (or the chef) that the Ban Mi served is 100% vegetarian. The street vendors make better food than the Sheraton chefs. Also, In room dining couldn't serve us Tomato soup as Sheraton Kitchen didn't have the ingredients for it. I could t believe it. I'm DEFINITELY NOT coming back or recommending this place at all.
sample_comments.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, Partial sea view

sample_comments.title: Danang or Hoi An? Why not have both?
sample_comments.positives: We stayed at the Sheraton Grand Danang for 3 nights at the start of January. The hotel itself is a grand construction with the largest swimming pool I've ever seen in my life. It's hard to fault the hotel itself, but it was also hard to fall in love with it or recommend it. They didn't do anything wrong, but for the price point, it was lacking that something extra special, and food and beverage within the complex is quite expensive compared to other accommodation that was stayed at during the trip. While you are a little marooned, and quite a distance from Danang city itself, you are just as close to Hoi An, so for travellers looking to visit both Hoi An and Danang, but not wanting to commit to 2 different hotels, this presents the perfect location.
sample_comments.negatives: Again, no fault of the staff at the hotel, but there was a distinct lack of atmosphere for a resort style hotel (i.e. anything by Shangri-la group). Food and beverage options within the hotel are also on the high end.

sample_comments.title: Pleasant Stay
sample_comments.text: We stayed 4 nights at the King Pool View room, which was very pleasant. The staff at the resort are very friendly and helpful. The resort location is about in the mid-way of Danang city center and Hoi An. The Resort pool should open longer, instead of close 7pm. The Resort should have gaming room, like snooker or any other table games provides. Breakfast is sufficient with plenty of variety and good service. However, we do not hesitate to stay again in Sheraton Grand Danang Resort & Convention Centre.
sample_comments.response:

Sheraton Grand Danang Resort Team

sample_comments.title: A fantastic family getaway with great food, activities, and service. We would definitely come back!
sample_comments.positives:
We stayed in a suite with my family, and it was a truly wonderful experience.

Location: The resort is calm and quiet, away from the busy Da Nang city, yet everything is easily accessible within 15 minutes.

Staff: Very friendly and always willing to help. A special thanks to Hai (Expert Bellboy) for taking care of us throughout our 3-day stay.

Pool: Absolutely amazing and well-designed. It covers a large area, so you can enjoy it without feeling crowded.

Food: The highlight of our stay! Honestly, some of the best food I've had in my life.

Activities: Perfect for families. There's a waterpark, indoor and outdoor play areas for kids, and plenty of fun activities arranged by the resort. Truly family-friendly!
sample_comments.negatives:
Housekeeping disturbed us a few times even though we had the "Do Not Disturb" sign on.

Slight waiting time for breakfast, but they did offer snacks and coffee while we waited, which was thoughtful.

sample_comments.title: Nice resort hotel
sample_comments.text: Nice resort hotel with a 24 hours infinity pool. There is a private beach too. Staff is great and very professional. The room was big and very clean. The spa doesn't have that many option and the quality of the massage is not that good. You can get a better massage for way cheaper in the center city of Da Nang. There are 3 restaurants (all quite expensive). Breakfast buffet is very good and with many choices!

We are so happy to know that you enjoyed your stay by experience our compelling culinary options and room facilities as well as our stunning infinity pool operating 24 hours. Besides we could not be more pleased to know that our staff has made your vacation good memorable experience. Your opinions are very valuable in helping us maintain a high level of service to guests and in ensuring that your expectations are met on each visit.. We very much look forward to the pleasure of welcoming you back to Sheraton Grand Danang Resort in the near future.

Best Regards,

LAN, NGUYEN

DIRECTOR OF MARKETING COMMUNICATIONS

sample_comments.title: Very nice, relaxing and enjoyable
sample_comments.positives: The breakfast was very good. The cocktails were superb and refreshing. The place has ample entertainment activites for the kids. My 1.5 year old thoroughly enjoyed her time in the play area. They also have a kids 'water park', very nice.
sample_comments.negatives: However, the pork bahn-mi at the La Plage was not that great. Our hotel (building 2) was on the far end from the breakfast and main reception area, so there quite a walk, unless you book a buggy.

sample_comments.title: A great hotel with the worst group of guests and unprofessional responses from the staff.
sample_comments.text: A group of Indian guests arrived and asked to wait for 5 to 10 minutes before entering the breakfast area, so I sat down. However, a few Indian guests did not follow the order and just barged in without anyone properly stopping them. I patiently waited, but when I was finally allowed in, I found it was already crowded again after waiting for almost 15 minutes. While trying to eat breakfast, I noticed the Indian guests were picking up food with their hands, eating directly, and then sucking their fingers before touching the food again and handling the utensils. Shouldn't someone intervene in such behavior? Just like if someone were to throw food at others, the staff would need to stop that. Although I received good service at a really nice hotel, my experience with the Indian guests was the worst. If I find a place that does not accept Indian guests, I would choose to stay there.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Juhan,

Thank you for sharing your experience with us. We're truly delighted to know you appreciated the service from our team and the quality of our hotel. At the same time, we sincerely regret to hear about your uncomfortable experience during breakfast.

Please be assured that we take such feedback seriously. Our team is committed to ensuring that all guests enjoy a pleasant dining environment, and we will reinforce our efforts to guide guests on proper etiquette and hygiene standards in the buffet area. Your comments are very valuable in helping us improve both our service and communication with guests.

We greatly appreciate your understanding and hope to welcome you back for a much more enjoyable stay in the future.

Warm regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Beach Resort & SPA Team

sample_comments.positives: Staff were exceptionally nice and always willing to help.

sample_comments.title: The swimming pool is good, the breakfast is so-so.
sample_comments.text: I chose this place because of the pool, and it was great because the pool is so spacious that I could use short fins and a tube very comfortably. It was especially amazing to be able to kayak in the pool, haha. The room condition was okay too. However, the breakfast was a bit disappointing. It was the most disappointing breakfast among all the hotels and resorts I have stayed at so far. Also, since the location is a bit far, the Grab fare was quite high, haha. Still, I had a good time relaxing.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Hyejin,

Thank you for sharing your feedback about your stay at Sheraton Grand Danang Resort & Convention Center. We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed our spacious pool, especially the unique kayaking experience. It's also great to know that you found the room conditions satisfactory and had a restful stay.

We're truly sorry to hear that our breakfast did not meet your expectations. Your comments have been shared with our culinary team to review and enhance our breakfast offerings. Additionally, we regret any inconvenience caused by the location. We appreciate your understanding and will consider ways to improve accessibility for our guests.

Your feedback is invaluable, and we hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for an even better experience.

Warm regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Resort Team

sample_comments.title: Perfect relaxation Spot for some sun and mind and soul soothing time
sample_comments.positives:
The hotel structure is majestic and you can see it's been going on successfully for a while. The pool is a dream and the proximity to the beach.. I mean, the hotel is at the beach. The breakfast buffet is phenomenal and catering for all sorts of food allergies, so my coeliac partner was not short on options One of our favorite things was to have early breakfast and walk for about 2km at the beach to digest food before relaxing in on eof the many sunbeds available. Absolutely dreamy. The staff is so polite and super friendly. They exchange money at the hotel as well which is quite helpful if your whole mood is to relax.
The suttle buses to and from Hoi An are a MUST and I consider itan absolute gem of a deal provided by the hotel.
We loved it.
sample_comments.negatives: nothing. the hotel and staff are lovely

sample_comments.title: Sheraton Grand Danang Resort
sample_comments.text: The hotel as the name implied is grand. However, during the offseason, they should give more discounts as the resort was very empty and most of the facilities were not opened and the dining facilities prices were very expensive! Going outside to eat is so much cheaper for a comparable restaurant. It is the rainy season when we were there so many facilities could not be used. They really need to relook at their marketing strategy. Overall, not a value for money resort.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Chew, 
Thank you for sharing your experience with us. 

We apologize for any inconvenience caused during your stay. We will take your feedback into consideration for further enhancements. We appreciate your honest review.

Warm Regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Resort Team

sample_comments.title: Exceptional

sample_comments.title: Nice pool
sample_comments.text:
It may be the longest pool (?) in Vietnam (?), gotta check that.

The service and staff were all friendly & helpful.

The swimming pool is the centerpiece of this hotel. It spans from the beach to the lobby building, and this site is long.

The kids play rooms were decent for a few hours to occupy the young ones.

The breakfast buffet was standard among its class of hotels.

There were some little things that proved inconvenient to some of us: broken shower head, snails and crabs crawling around the room, dead bugs in the private pool, live bugs entering our room.

The private beach is also a nice feature, that is usually reserved for bigger establishments such as this.
sample_comments.response:

We appreciate you taking time to share with us your experience while at our hotel. Thank you for your positive comments about our facilities, service, and signature pool which is the longest pool in Danang. We are very pleased that you enjoyed your stay at our hotel. Also, please accept our apology about the unexpected inconvenience you experienced. We are continuously working on the issue you shared, through insect control to improve the condition in the summer season. Thanks for your constructive feedback.

Once again, thank you for sharing with us your experience and we are looking forward to welcoming you back for another holiday.

Warmest regards,

Sheraton Grand Danang Resort.

sample_comments.title: Simply amazing. I had a fantastic stay!
sample_comments.positives: I had breakfast from my room and it was spectacular. The American style breakfast was good value for money.
sample_comments.negatives: There's nothing I didn't like.

sample_comments.title: I really like it.
sample_comments.text: The staff are all very kind and seem well-trained in hospitality. The bed was comfortable and the extra bed was also fine. The swimming pool is incredibly large and is well-maintained; perhaps because the outside temperature is high, the water in the pool was warm, which was actually great for playing with my child for a long time. My child really enjoyed the pool's playground too. The sand at the beach in front of the resort is soft and the waves aren't strong, so it looked good for swimming. The breakfast had a variety of choices and was delicious, leading to overeating in the morning. The high chairs in the breakfast area looked sturdy and were great. Although the hotel cost was not small in Vietnam, I was very satisfied and would like to use it again next time.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Eunyeong,

Warm greetings from Sheraton Grand Danang Beach Resort & SPA Team,

Thank you so much for choosing to stay with us and for sharing such a detailed and heartwarming review.

We are truly delighted to know that you had a wonderful experience and appreciated so many aspects of your stay - from the warmth and professionalism of our staff to the comfort of our rooms, the cleanliness and size of the pool, and the family-friendly facilities throughout the resort. We're especially happy to hear your child enjoyed the kids' water playground, and that our beach and breakfast offerings added to your overall satisfaction.

Your kind words mean a great deal to our team and serve as great encouragement as we continue striving to deliver memorable experiences for every guest.

We sincerely look forward to welcoming you and your family back for another enjoyable and relaxing stay in the near future.

Thank you once again and best regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Beach Resort & SPA Team

sample_comments.title: There's nothing around, but...
sample_comments.text:
I understood, but I don't think there were any shops around the hotel. I was thirsty, and even though I wanted something other than water, the fridge was empty. We each had two bottles of mineral water in a glass bottle. I wanted juice, so I ordered room service. The fresh orange juice was less than 1000 yen, which was reasonable and nice.

The pool is really big and beautiful. You can swim until 7 PM, and it is lit up until around 9 PM. Overall, I was satisfied. I didn't have time for meals except in the morning, but the food was neither good nor bad. There was pho, but it had star anise in it.

sample_comments.title: Lovely stay with great staff service!
sample_comments.positives: The breakfast selection was great - I looked forward to coming for breakfast every morning. They had a special coffee every morning, and that was really nice. The room and bathroom facilities were excellent. But what was most impressive was the staff service. They could remember who we were, and even some of our preferences, and what we ordered the day before. I loved the space, it didn't feel like anyone was encroaching upon our personal space. Food was a little on the pricey side, but I suppose it's to be expected at a resort. Love the pool as well!
sample_comments.negatives: When we were there, the Mix Bar was not open. Apparently we were told they only open for events - thought it would be nice to be communicated somehow on the website or something, cos we were looking forward to it. But it's a small issue.

sample_comments.title: I like spending time with my child.
sample_comments.text: I stayed with my 1-year-old and 5-year-old on a family trip. It is a kid-friendly hotel. The staff were friendly, and the breakfast was also decent. The only downside is the location. The location can be both an advantage and a disadvantage, but since deliveries are available, it wasn't a big problem. When we got hungry while playing in the pool, we ordered food and continued to play. The pool was very large and nice, but the sun was too hot, so we couldn't enjoy it. Overall, it was excellent.
sample_comments.response:
Dear jinsik,

Thank you for sharing your feedback! We're delighted to hear that you and your children had an enjoyable family trip at our resort. It's wonderful to know you appreciated our friendly staff, decent breakfast, and large pool.

We're sorry to hear the location and pool heat were less than ideal. Your comments are valuable, and we'll share them with our team to explore improvements. We're glad delivery services helped keep everyone satisfied!

We hope to welcome you and your family back for another excellent stay.

Best regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Resort Team

sample_comments.title: Wonderful!
sample_comments.positives: We spent 11 delightful days at this wonderful resort. We enjoyed our stay so much that we've decided to return in March. Everything was to our liking, and the staff were exceptionally kind and helpful. The resort boasts three excellent restaurants, with our favorites being The Tables and The Grill. We had a delightful hot pot dinner at The Tables and a sophisticated dining experience at The Grill. Every breakfast was a joy, among the best in our many stays, offering almost everything we expected. The staff went above and beyond to ensure we had the best experience, and although I can't name everyone here, I'd like to specifically mention Vu Nguyen, who made a great effort to accommodate our needs for our next stay. The resort features an incredible swimming pool, measuring an impressive 250 meters in length! We extend our gratitude to everyone for their hard work and dedication.
sample_comments.negatives: It would be good to display the temperature of the pool water

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text:
Room sensational
Buffet brekkie wonderful with an enormous selection that caters to everyone
Staff very friendly
Pool clean and accessible
Direct access to the beach is a treat.

The on site Restaurant's food let us down and the variety vs. price vs. expectations vs. quality of a 5 star resort - we would expect better.

Location is isolated so if you want to be in a resort you don't have to leave then it's fine. But if you want to get out and about - it would be better to be closer to the city Centre. There is only 1 shuttle in and out per day which could be increased.

We stayed 4 days and were ready to move on but very much enjoyed the comfort of our stay.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Guest,

Thank you for your detailed review! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed your room, the wonderful buffet breakfast, and our friendly staff. It's great to know that you appreciated the clean and accessible pool, as well as the direct beach access.

We also value your feedback regarding the on-site restaurant and will take it into consideration for future improvements. While our location offers a serene resort experience, we understand the desire for more frequent transportation options to the city center.

We appreciate your insights and hope to welcome you back for another comfortable stay!

Warm regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Resort Team

sample_comments.title: Perfect.
sample_comments.positives: Every staffs were so helpful(including Hein), the property was really cool, awesome breakfast and amazing pool. Highly recommend.
sample_comments.negatives: nothing

sample_comments.title: Recommended for those who prefer a comfortable vacation spot.
sample_comments.text:
2024 Review - I visited last year and liked it so much that I came back. All the facilities are still well-maintained, and the service from the staff was still the best among travel destinations in Vietnam. I don't think I ever heard the word "no" in any of my inquiries. 

*The only downside is that they manage the garden and grass daily, and sometimes the grass ends up in the pool, causing debris to form.

2023 Review - I booked a Deluxe pool view / Double queen bed room, and I loved the spacious and clean room. 

There were various storage spaces and plenty of room around the bed, so it didn't feel cramped at all, which I especially liked. The bathroom was also spacious and clean.

I thought the pool view would only show the pool, but the balcony was designed at an angle so that it provided the best views of the pool, the sea, and the open sky. I highly recommend staying on a higher floor!!!

Service When I moved to another accommodation, I felt that the staff here were friendly, communicated well in English, and had received good training.

Food I enjoyed the banh mi and pho that were served for breakfast every day (be sure to ask for extra meat in the pho, and don't forget to sprinkle fish sauce and fresh chili on the banh mi). I also recommend the cocktails and platter dishes at La Plage restaurant. Both the taste and scenery were top-notch!!

Cleanliness I wanted to give it 5 stars, but perhaps because the pool is so big, I felt that the cleaning of debris in the water could be improved. (It was a bit disappointing because it looked so beautiful from the surface; you wouldn't notice unless you dove in.)
sample_comments.response:
Dear kiy,

Thank you for your fantastic review! We are thrilled to hear that you chose to return to us after your previous visit. It's wonderful to know that our facilities have been well-maintained and that our staff continues to provide exceptional service.

We truly appreciate your feedback regarding the pool cleanliness and will work on improving that aspect. We're glad you enjoyed your spacious room with its stunning views and that our breakfast offerings met your expectations.

Your recommendations about our food and cocktails are much appreciated, and we can't wait to welcome you back for another memorable stay!

Warm regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Resort Team

Kindly let us know whenever you have plan to come back to Danang city again.

Warmest regards,

Sheraton Grand Danang Resort.

It is also a pleasure to hear that our complimentary floats and activities added to your experience, and that the wide selection of Vietnamese dishes at breakfast made your stay even more memorable.

Your kind words mean a lot to our team, and we truly appreciate you taking the time to share them. We look forward to welcoming you back for another relaxing and enjoyable stay.

Warm regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Beach Resort & SPA Team

A wonderful relaxing stay. Awesome large pool looking over the beach. Breakfast and choice was top notch. Room service and dinner at La Plage was also of good quality and delicious. The chefs were present during breakfast service checking on the food. The Aussie chef I spoke with was friendly and happy for a chat. We stayed in a king suite which was clean and comfortable with a wonderful view of the sea and pool. Would I stay again- most definitely. 
Only a few issues:
-Pool side cleaning at 8:45am- does not seem timely on an Easter weekend when we wanted to get settled early by the pool for the day. 
-Slow service with cocktails by the pool.
-Quality of cocktails needs improving.
sample_comments.response:

Thank you for taking the time to share your recent experience with us. We're delighted to know you enjoyed the comfort of our service, the culinary moments at La Plage and our breakfast buffet. It's also wonderful to hear that our chefs made a positive impression!
We sincerely appreciate your feedback regarding poolside cleanliness timing and cocktail service. Rest assured, your comments have been shared with the team for review and improvement.
We look forward to welcoming you back for another relaxing getaway.

Warm regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Resort Team

This hotel is good for taking pictures, but it doesn't seem like a good choice for families to enjoy.

sample_comments.positives: Personal war immer freundlich und hat gegrüßt.
sample_comments.negatives:
- Frühstück war eintönig. Kaum Wechsel im Essensangebot.
- Die Preise im Hotel sind übertrieben hoch. Der Aufpreis für Roomservice alleine kostet fast so viel wie ein Grab in die Stadt.
-Pool sieht zwar von der größe nett aus, aber ist sehr heruntergekommen. Fließen fallen ab und hinterlassen scharfe Kanten.
-Strand war vermüllt und wirkte wenig einladend.
-Kaum Liegen und Sonnenschirme am Strand und diese waren zum Teil kaputt.
-Liegen am Pool waren ebenfalls oft kaputt und die Matratzen sahen oft dreckig aus. 
- Die Gegend um das Hotel ist karg. Nebenan ist eine Baustelle. Es gibt nichts zu erkunden. Für Restaurants oder Erkundungen muss man immer per Grab irgendwo hinfahren.

sample_comments.title: Punctuality, Food Menu
sample_comments.text:
Everything was great specially location .
Room was spacious and comfortable.
Breakfast spread was good for non vegetarians but almost no options for vegetarians.While at Intercontinental Hotel,they kept a separate Indian vegetarian menu where we got aloo paranthas too with sabudana khichdi. A little extra effort on that front will give u good reputation from Indian travelers who are in Vietnam in huge numbers.
Plus at 10.31 they won't serve you anything as their breakfast time ends at 10.30 am so be very very punctual.
Except that everything was excellent.
Thanks for a pleasant stay.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Renu,

Thank you for your feedback on our room and food. We are glad to hear that you enjoyed our location, spacious rooms, and comfortable stay. We appreciate your suggestions for more vegetarian options and will definitely consider them to improve our services for Indian travelers. We apologize for the strict breakfast timing and will work on better accommodating our guests. We hope to welcome you back again soon.

Warm regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Resort Team

sample_comments.positives: Frühstück sehr gut. Pool sehr gut.
sample_comments.negatives: Aussicht Meer nicht wie erwartet, hätte besser sein sollen. Ausstattung des Zimmers ausgelegt auf eine Person, 2 Personen können nicht zusammen sitzen. Sitzgelegenheiten unbequem. Fernsehprogramm sehr dürftig, inbesondere für Ausländer. Sollte Golfchannel und mehr ausländische bzw. Filmsender haben. Keine gute Restauration, lediglich ein sehr teures "Signiture-Restaurant" mit sehr hohen Preisen und ein Restaurant mit italienischer Küche, kein vietnamesisches Restaurant im ganzen Hotel! Sehr schlecht, zumal in der Nähe überhaupt keine anderen Restaurants.

sample_comments.title: Schöner Urlaub
sample_comments.positives: Sehr schöne gepflegte Anlage, mit großem Pool. Sehr gut für Kinder geeignet. Ist schön am Meer gelegen und man kann sehr gut entspannen. Außerdem gibt es Frühstück bis 11:00 Uhr was für Langschläfer wirklich perfekt ist.
sample_comments.negatives: Es liegt leider relativ abgelegen. Fußläufig. Aus dem Hotel hinaus ist nicht viel zu finden. Preise der Restaurants überhöht.

sample_comments.title: Amazing hotel, superb service!
sample_comments.text:
We stayed at this lovely hotel from Nov 11th to Nov 15th.

The front desk lady who checked us in on Nov 11th was personable, helpful, friendly and gave us superb service with a smile. I would appreciate it if you could inform the hotel management so that they can give a commendation to this staff.

The premise and its facilities were amazing and all the staff at the resort were friendly and helpful. Highly service oriented.

As we are coming out of COVID, the hotel didn't operate all of its F&B outlets with the lower occupancy. We totally understand, however, we wished we could have sampled the food at The Grill.

All in all our first visit to Da Nang was great and we will be back again.

Warmest Regards, 

Dr. Andrew Chew
sample_comments.response:
Dear Andrew

Thank you for your wonderful review of your recent stay at Sheraton Grand Danang Resort. We are thrilled to hear that you had a great experience with our staff and enjoyed our facilities. We will definitely pass on your commendation to our front desk. We look forward to welcoming you back on your next visit to Da Nang.

Warm regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Resort Team
sample_comments.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, Pool view, Plunge pool

sample_comments.title: Preis-Leistung stimmten hier im November sehr gut.
sample_comments.positives: Wir waren im November 2023, eigentlich ist noch Regenzeit und es hat deshalb wenige Leute. Trotzdem waren die Restaurants offen und von sehr guter Qualität! Die Leute sind äusserst freundlich und hilfsbereit, das Zimmer zählt nicht zu den grössten, so hat uns der Wohnbereich gefehlt. Wir hatten eine Pool-Suite, doch das Minipool vor dem Zimmer könnte man sich sparen. Die Anlage ist grosszügig, sauber und für Kinder sehr geeignet.
sample_comments.negatives: Der Strand war nicht gepflegt, was wohl mit der Regenzeit zu tun hatte. )Es hat aber nicht oft geregnet!) Das Meer war sehr unruhig, so das man nicht darin baden konnte. Für Strandurlaub ist der November nicht geeignet.

sample_comments.title: Calm. Nice breakfast. Kind staff.
sample_comments.text: I reserved a Bay View, but I upgraded to a Pool View. The Bay View was a bit boring, and the Pool View is nice because I can also see the sunrise. The overall atmosphere is quiet, and I used the facilities leisurely. The bedding was much more comfortable than other competing 5-star hotels. The breakfast was so good that I didn't want to skip anything. I have been staying at different 5-star hotels for 8 days, and I liked this place so much that I want to go back to Sheraton. There were hardly any Koreans here. The Hyatt, another 5-star hotel, has a lot of Koreans. The only downside is that if they managed the pool a bit more (water quality, floor tile repairs, the water depth is too low), it would be perfect. Keep in mind that the city is a bit far.
sample_comments.response:
Dear John,

Thank you for your kind review. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed the calm atmosphere, our breakfast, and the warm service from our team. It's also great to know you appreciated the Pool View upgrade and the beautiful sunrise.

We truly value your feedback on pool maintenance and will share it with our team to improve.

We hope to welcome you back to Sheraton again soon. 

Warm regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Beach Resort & SPA Team

sample_comments.title: If I plan a trip to Da Nang again, I will definitely go to Sheraton Grand Da Nang Resort.
sample_comments.text: If you are looking for a resort where you can enjoy swimming and relaxation right in front of the vast ocean, I definitely recommend this place. It is especially recommended if you are traveling with kids. Perhaps that's why there are many families staying here. Since it is located on the beach in Da Nang, you have to take a taxi for shopping or dining outside, so I stayed at the Hilton Hotel for 4 days before going to this resort. I booked the Sheraton Grand Danang Resort with relaxation in mind, and since it is close to Hoi An, I spent most of my time enjoying meals and coffee at the hotel and swimming, except for a few hours in the afternoon when I visited Hoi An. I stayed for two nights, but I feel like I didn't enjoy it enough, so I am planning to return to the Sheraton Grand Danang Hotel for my next trip to Da Nang. I absolutely recommend this place for relaxation in Da Nang.

- Phát sinh phí bắt buộc rất vô lý, nhưng đã tới nhận phòng rồi thì đành phải chấp nhận nhưng không hài lòng. Cụ thể tôi thuê 2 phòng giống như nhau, 1 phòng cho 2 người giá 18 triệu và 1 phòng cho 3 người giá 22 triệu (trên booking và mail đều thể hiện phòng dành cho 3 người), nhưng khi đến khách sạn bắt phụ thu thêm 4 triệu cho người thứ 3 nữa, có nghĩa là tôi phải đóng cho người thứ 3 này 2 lần phí (khi đặt booking và khi nhận phòng tạ resort). Thực ra, nếu rõ ràng thì tôi chỉ cần đặt 2 phòng như nhau cho 2 người/ phòng với giá 18 triêu/ phòng, sau đó khi nhận phòng tôi chỉ trả thêm 4tr phụ thu người thứ 3 thôi
- Có nhiều phí linh tinh phát sinh không đáng với resort cao cấp như vầy (như ra hồ bơi mượn phao chụp hình vài phút cũng tính phí, khu vui chơi trẻ em có vài trò chơi cũng tính phí như tô tượng,...), chi phí nhỏ thôi nhưng rất phiền phức và không vui khi đi đâu cũng thấy phí. Với tầm cỡ resort này thì nên bao gồm trong giá luôn như các khách sạn, resort ngang tầm để khách thoải mái hơn.

sample_comments.title: It's a hotel I definitely want to visit again.
sample_comments.text:
I went on a free trip with my family. As expected from a 5-star hotel, the staff were friendly, the room was spacious, and the bedding and bed were very comfortable, allowing me to sleep really well. The pool view is fantastic.

It takes about 20 minutes by car from downtown Da Nang, but it's much quieter and more private than the hotels in the downtown beach area, which made it really enjoyable to have a hotel vacation. The pool is as beautiful and long as it looks in the pictures, and during times when there aren't many guests, it really feels like a proper hotel vacation. Since there aren't many Koreans here, it gives a real sense of being in a foreign resort. The breakfast included kimchi soup and japchae, so I ate well, and it's a reasonably priced place where you can truly enjoy a 5-star resort experience. I definitely want to go back!

Dear KIM,

Thank you for your review. We are pleased that your family had a great experience with us and enjoyed our spacious rooms, comfortable beds, and fantastic pool view. We are glad you appreciated the quieter and private location. Your feedback on the breakfast options is appreciated and we are happy to hear that you had a proper 5-star resort experience with us. We look forward to your next visit.

Warm regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Resort Team

sample_comments.title: A few elements marred the experience
sample_comments.positives:
What was great:
- The breakfast selection was great, with many options
- The room cleanliness was great too. 
- The bed was comfortable.
sample_comments.negatives:
What could have been done better:
- It was the first time in my life that I've experienced a hotel not allowing the airconditioning to go below 21C. Especially when they give very thick bedding, it is to be expected that it will get hot during the night. 
- Because of the lack of coolness from the airconditioning, we then requested a fan. Housekeeping said they would bring a fan within 5 minutes but took an hour to come.
- It was also our first time in a long time experiencing a hotel that did not have a smart TV, allowing us to sign into our netflix etc to watch movies. We then asked the hotel for a HDMI cable or adapter to connect our ipad/laptop to the TV. However, they did not have it. This was extremely surprising seeing as they are also known as a convention centre, and definitely have presentations etc that need projecting. Not having a HDMI was wild.
- Be careful with the pool, it is shallow and the corner of the steps at certain areas are very sharp, we did get hurt there the first time we swam.

sample_comments.title: Nice water park and place area
sample_comments.text: Should bring socks, long sleeve shirt and trouser if kids wish to play in their indoor play area. They offer great sliders which requires whoever wishes to slide on to wear those. We didn't bring any of it and had to pay quiet some to purchase from them, which we are not gonna wear in the future.. Bring a jack is recommended as well, as their elevator hall at each floor is freezing. Except that, we love this hotel. Will come back to stay.

As part of my promotion package was given "2 hours free drinks and local beer" at pool area. Firstly, the staff did not seem aware of such offers. sample_comments.title: Perfect for a trip with friends and family!!
sample_comments.text: I visited with my three daughters, and overall, I am satisfied because it is a clean and well-maintained place. The pool is large and relatively clean, making it great for taking photos and having fun in the water. Lastly, it connects to the sea at the end, so if the waves are not strong, it is conveniently accessible. We stayed for two days with breakfast included, and the breakfast options varied daily, which my mother particularly enjoyed :) Additionally, the friendly guidance from the staff and their attitude towards understanding customer needs were truly impressive. There's even a staff member who speaks Korean, and there are Korean staff members as well, so I was able to get significant help without any disappointment in handling accommodation, facility services, and cost-related matters accurately. It's a suitable place for families or friends to relax, and I have been recommending it to people around me~ If I go back to Da Nang, I plan to visit again! Thank you :)

The staff is trying but guess need more training in customer management.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Patrick,

Thank you for taking the time to provide feedback on your recent stay at Sheraton Grand Danang Resort. We're disappointed to learn that we didn't meet your expectations during your time with us. Please accept our sincere apologies for any inconvenience or disappointment you experienced. We value your input and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future, where we aim to provide you with the exceptional experience you deserve.

Warm regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Resort Team

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: The service was great! And they have live music evenings that we enjoyed greatly. The hotel is well-maintained, beautiful, and spacious.
sample_comments.negatives: The area itself is polluted and not suitable for a walk. Right next door is a property with multiple abandoned villas. The beach is not clean, so if you wish to go for a walk beyond the hotel's territory, be ready for that.

sample_comments.title: Superbe
sample_comments.text: Tolles Hotel direkt am Strand - etwas ruhiger und 25 Minuten bis Hoi An oder Da Nang mit dem Grab.
sample_comments.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, Partial sea view

sample_comments.title: Our stay was pleasant and enjoyable
sample_comments.positives: Great
sample_comments.negatives: All was good

sample_comments.title: あまり良い思い出にはなりませんでした
sample_comments.text:
中心部から離れているため静かに過ごす予定でしたが壁が薄いのか隣の宿泊者の会話や足音が丸聞こえで、安いアパートメントホテルにでも居るようでした
外出から部屋に戻ると部屋は下水か何かの異臭がし、トイレ内のゴミ箱近くの壁には前の宿泊者が残した髪の毛の塊のゴミがベッタリ。それが滞在中３日目まで残ったまま。最終日にやっと綺麗になってました。
バスタブにも髪が落ちていたのでお湯をいれると浮いてきて良くわかりました
プールの底には蟹の死骸が落ちていたりとシェラトンと言うブランドの割に残念な気持ちになりました
悪い思い出ばかりではないですが、再びダナンを訪れる事があっても滞在先には選びません
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback. We are truly sorry to hear that your experience did not meet expectations and that several aspects of your stay caused disappointment.

Please accept our sincere apologies for the issues you encountered regarding room cleanliness, unpleasant odors, noise disturbance, and the condition of the pool area. This is not the standard we aim to provide, and your comments have been shared immediately with our Housekeeping, Engineering, and Operations teams for thorough investigation and corrective action.

We also regret that these concerns were not addressed promptly during your stay. We understand how this impacted your overall experience, and we are taking your feedback seriously to reinforce our quality control procedures and prevent similar situations from happening again.

While we are saddened to learn that you would not choose to stay with us again, we sincerely appreciate your honest comments, as they he
sample_comments.room_type: Guest room, 2 Twin, Pool view, Plunge pool

sample_comments.title: Overall very good
sample_comments.positives: Breakfast was magnificent
sample_comments.negatives:
No mini bar in our room 
The beach bar didn't allow us happy hour as we were not a certain member even though we had joined bonvoy

sample_comments.title: コスパ悪すぎ、こんなシェラトン泊まる価値無し
sample_comments.text:
ビーチはきれいではない。また、立地が悪く、またレストランもほとんどやってないのに、ルームダイニングは22時で終わります。まわりにレストランもありません。シェラトンに泊まっても、食料難民になりかねません。
スタッフがとても少なく、コストをかなり抑えようとしており、フロントに電話してもほぼ繋がりません。
朝食も全く感動はなく、なぜか他の人と近いところに座らせようとしてきます。
敷地がとても広いのに、バギーが来るのはとても遅く、かなり待ちます。
コスト削減がみえみえで、コロナが完全に回復するまで、泊まるべきではないと思います。
こんなシェラトンはあり得ないと思います。
sample_comments.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, Partial sea view

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Breakfast was fantastic staff friendly and very attentive

sample_comments.title: ちょっとガッカリ
sample_comments.text:
風呂のお湯はたっぷりある。
プールは広いが何か足りない感じ。
sample_comments.room_type: Guest room, 2 Twin, Partial sea view

sample_comments.title: In my opinion, one of the best resorts for kids in Da Nang.
sample_comments.positives: Amazing pool, small "water park" for kids and fabulous breakfast. The rooms are also spacious and beautiful.
sample_comments.negatives: Probably the location

sample_comments.title: 静かにゆっくり過ごすには最適かも
sample_comments.text: ダナン中心部から少し遠いので、他のビーチ沿いのホテルと比べると賑わいのようなものは感じられなかった。ただその分ゆったりと静かに過ごすことは出来た。ビーチもきれいだし、レストラン、プールも良い。スタッフの方々も親切で、サービスも行き届いている。あえて言うなら、冷房が強すぎることと、そのせいか床が湿って居るような状態になることか。Villaは使われていないようだったが、機会があればVillaも利用してみたい。

sample_comments.title: A very good hotel, with some problems
sample_comments.positives: Staff was very nice and quickly helped when my son when he got hurt, and helped me when i lost my airpods after checking out. Pool, food and the room were good.
sample_comments.negatives: the pool was showing its age and was missing alot of tiles, and so much that my son cut his food pretter badly. Pretty expensive.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: 子連れで2泊しました。インド系の団体客が沢山いて、朝食の時も会場の半分を占めていて少し異様な光景でした。宿泊の値段も安い訳ではないので、団体客を受け入れるのはどうなのかなと思いました。ホテルの施設も古いのか、部屋の匂いが少し気になりました。プールはとても良かったです。サップを無料で利用できたり、景色もとても良かったです。子供も気に入っていました。
sample_comments.response:
Dear NATSUMI,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We are glad to hear that you and your children enjoyed our pool, SUP activities, and beautiful views. We also appreciate your honest comments regarding the crowd during breakfast and the room condition. Your feedback is valuable and will help us improve our guest experience. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you and your family back in the future.

Best Regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Beach Resort & SPA Team
sample_comments.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, Pool view, Plunge pool

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Breakfast was great

sample_comments.title: 豪華なホテル
sample_comments.text: ダナン4泊5日中の2泊で利用しました。豪華なホテルで、外観、内装、部屋、プール、レストランなど全てがさすがシェラトンという感じでした。250mプールを目的に行きましたが、期待通りの大きなプールで、旅の目的がプールでゆっくりという我々には最高の時間を過ごせました。プールサイドのレストランで2回昼食を取りましたが、高級ホテルにしてはそこまで高くなく、美味しかったです。パスタで1000円ちょっとくらい？でした。ただ、ホテルの値段に比べてサービスは普通で、1回泊まれば満足という感じ。もっと安い値段で、サービスが行き届いており、満足出来るホテルは他にもあるので、1度豪華絢爛なホテルを味わいたいという方にはオススメです。あとは立地がやはり街中から離れているので、タクシー代が無駄。Grabの使用をオススメします。
sample_comments.response:
Dear keita,

Thank you for staying and sharing your experience with us.

We are happy to hear that you enjoyed the resort and all the facilities. Your comment about our service was shared to our team for further improvement.
Please let us know if you have plan to go back to Danang again.

Kind regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang.

sample_comments.title: Relaxing and enjoyable
sample_comments.positives: Definitely the pool and all the customer facing staffs are very friendly. The bed and duvet are very comfortable
sample_comments.negatives: The tile floor in the room becomes very slippery when wet, especially in the bathroom. Water tends to splash out during showers, even when the shower door is closed, making the floor even more hazardous

sample_comments.title: 老舗です
sample_comments.text:
いいホテルです　ただキッズ重視で子供多すぎて落ち着きがない
市街地へのアクセス悪くてタクシー代がかさむ
年寄りには広すぎて移動が大変
sample_comments.response:
Dear Miho,

Thank you very much for sharing your feedback with us. We're pleased to hear that you found our hotel to be a good place to stay.

At the same time, we appreciate your honest comments regarding the family atmosphere, distance from the city center, and the size of the resort. As a family-friendly beachfront resort, we do welcome many guests with children, especially during holiday periods. We also understand that the large property layout and transportation to the city may not be convenient for every traveler.

Your feedback is truly valuable to us, and we sincerely appreciate you taking the time to share your experience. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again in the future.

Best Regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Beach Resort & Spa Team

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: The staff very friendly, always assist us in everything. Hotel with very big swimming pool with many facilities for our kids. We love it the Sheraton
sample_comments.negatives: The swimming pool maintenance need to repair the blue tiles in some locations

sample_comments.title: 子供と一緒が楽しそう
sample_comments.text:
広くて、沢山の種類のプールがあるので子供連れは一日中遊んでいられそうです。
乾季に訪問するのがお勧めです。
sample_comments.response:
Dear HIROYUKI,

Thank you for your wonderful feedback! We're delighted to hear that you and your family enjoyed our spacious pools and found plenty of options for your children to play all day.

Visiting during the dry season is indeed a great recommendation. We look forward to welcoming you back for another fun-filled stay!

Warm regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Resort Team

sample_comments.title: Fantastic for a short stay in the sun!
sample_comments.positives: Amazing large rooms, with a very comfortable bed, facilities and staff were very helpful and couldn't do enough for you. A fantastic resort stay if you want a little more peace and quiet, away from the main drag.
sample_comments.negatives: Long wait times for snacks and drinks by the pool, lacked evening entertainment, needs some kind of bar with music etc for the evening. We loved the sunset vibes down by the beach but the DJ set was only from 5-7pm!

sample_comments.title: プールとビーチは最高です
sample_comments.text: 総体的に最高でした。特にプールとビーチは最高です。

Warm regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Resort Team

sample_comments.title: Lovely hotel, great breakfast and nice pools
sample_comments.positives: Lovely hotel, amenities were great, food for breakfast was delicious, the other restaurants could improve a little, we preferred to go out for dinner.. they have surfing and lots of other activities.. spa is way overpriced compared to the area, a treatment costs more than one night at the hotel..

sample_comments.title: 7月末のダナン滞在
sample_comments.text:
7月末は、灼熱の太陽が少ないベトナムの季節ですが、それでもダナンはお勧めてす。今回は、2泊しましたが、1日はホテルのプライベートビーチで過ごし、もう1日は、ミーケビーチにビーチアクティビティをしにでかけました。アクセスも悪くなく20分程の距離です。
最終日は、フライトまでホテルのプールでゆったり過ごしました！
また、利用すると思います。
sample_comments.response:
Dear YUSUKE,

It warms our hearts to know that your stay was not only relaxing but also filled with enjoyable activities and amenities that made your experience at the resort memorable. Your detailed review means the world to us!

Warm Regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Resort Team.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: The location was amazing and the breakfast exceeded our expectations The hotel provided numerous cuisines for the breakfast. But overall, The room was good until we found out that the AC was not working some how they arranged another room for us .

sample_comments.text:
部屋アップグレードしてもらい、ロケーション、プールは良かった

朝食は期待してた程ではく普通だった

sample_comments.negatives: Food and beverage onsite is western prices so that can be quite expensive compared to other areas in Vietnam.

Sheraton Grand Danang Resort Team
sample_comments.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, Pool view, Plunge pool

立地は、ホイアン、ダナン両方から20分程度なため、タクシーが必須です。
バイキングは非常に美味しく、プールも広くてよかったです。

sample_comments.negatives: Nothing.

sample_comments.title: 5歳、1歳連れ初海外旅行
sample_comments.text:
スタッフの方々が気さくに子どもたちに声をかけてくれとてもkidsfriendlyなホテルと感じました。
当方の気になることやお願い事には丁寧、迅速に対応して下さりとても助かりました。
ホテルの売りでもあるインフィニティプールには子どもたちも大満足で観光に出掛けても早くホテルに戻ってプールに入りたいと大騒ぎする程で少しでも時間があれば利用していました。
キッズルームや遊具なども充実しており、チェックアウト後も利用できたので帰りのフライトまで時間があった我々としては大変助かりました。
最後はお家に帰りたくないと子どもたちも大満足の滞在となりました。
また利用したいです。
sample_comments.response:
Dear Furusawa,

Your amazing feedback has truly made our day! We are so pleased to hear that you and your family had a fantastic stay with us and enjoyed our swimming pool, ourr well-equipped kid club and friendly staff. We are eagerly looking forward to the opportunity to host you again soon!

Warm regards,
Sheraton Grand Danang Resort Team.

sample_comments.positives: Everything the hotel was beautiful and the staff was kindly.
sample_comments.negatives: The beds was not so big,

sample_comments.title: Relaxing and peaceful - Hoi Anh visit a must
sample_comments.positives: Superb room and facilities
sample_comments.negatives: Restaurants a little limited

sample_comments.title: ホテルの位置
sample_comments.text: ダナン市街地とは少し離れていてタクシーの利用が必要であるが、ホイアンにはシャトルバス（100,000VND／人）が15時、20時発にある。

sample_comments.title: Lovely Hotel
sample_comments.positives: Helpful Staff with a great service, room was clean and spacious with a great bed, the pool was great !
sample_comments.negatives: Not near to the shops or restaurants, but we got a grab to Hoi An, which wasn't too bad.

sample_comments.title: 最高の休日
sample_comments.text:
飛行機の遅延がありましたがピックアップをお願いしていたので、ドライバーさんが出口まで迎えに来てくれて名前の確認もスムーズでした。
到着後のウエルカムドリンクも美味しかったです。
朝食のブッフェの後は、海とプールで子供は大はしゃぎでした。
ランチも海のそばで潮風にあたりながらのんびり過ごせました。
部屋はもちろん快適でバスタブにゆっくり浸かって疲れも癒されました。
チェックアウト前日にレイトチェックアウトをお願いしましたが、スタッフの方に丁寧に対応していただけました。おかげさまで帰りの日もプールをしっかりエンジョイすることが出来ました。
また、遊びにきたい思い出の場所になりました。

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Great friendly staff and excellent quality food
sample_comments.negatives: Location was half way between Hoi An and Danang which would have been fine, but timing and drop off location of the hotel shuttle service was not ideal, so you need to rely on taxis

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text:
コロナの影響と、ダナンが旅行シーズンではないため滞在中ずっと風雨でしたが、接するスタッフは皆気持ち良い対応をしてくれました。

リゾートとしてはプールや海がダメ、という今のようなシーズンになると、宿泊客は他にやることがなくなるのでは？
大人が屋内で遊べる施設などもあれば良いのにと思いました。

sample_comments.title: Excellent

sample_comments.title: 素敵なプール

sample_comments.response:

We understand that our beachfront location may feel a little removed from surrounding areas; however, many of our guests choose us to fully immerse themselves in a peaceful resort escape. We truly appreciate your comments regarding transportation and will continue looking for ways to enhance our guests' convenience.

It is also a pleasure to know that you enjoyed our breakfast. Your kind words mean a lot to our

sample_comments.text: 우선 레스토랑이 넘 부실하고 호텔에서 제공되는 액티비티가 거의 없고 가든뷰스위트를 예약했는데 가든뷰라는것이 없고 그냥 길뷰로 돈이 아깝다는 생각이 들어 어린아이와 호텔 수영장에서만 지내는것은 좋겠지만 어른들에게는 비추이다. 체크인때 웰컴드링크 커녕 제대로 안내를 안해주는 직원에게 할당받아 기분이 좋지 않았고 윚디 또한 선택 미쓰였다

sample_comments.title: 가족이용객인데 많이 추천하진 않아요.
sample_comments.text: 수영장은 정말 좋습니다. 그러나 화장실 변기에서 냄새가 올라오고 줄서서 카트를 기다리는데도 체크인하는 손님이 먼저라며 앞질러 버리더라고요... 줄서있는데 그런게 어디있냐고 항의했지만 소용없었고 나중에 프론트에서 항의를 따로 했습니다. 기분이 매우 안좋았어요.. 오픈한지 얼마 안되서 어수선하고 수영장 바닥에는 여러가지가 굴러다닙니다. 넓으니 청소하기가 힘들겠죠... 오픈한지 얼마 안되서 그런지 좀 안정화 되면 가는게 좋을듯 싶어요..
sample_comments.response:
HYEYOUNG 귀하,

안녕하십니까 Sheraton Grand Danang Resort입니다. 먼저 귀한 시간을 내어 소중한 리뷰를 남겨 주신 점에 진심으로 감사드립니다. 쉐라톤 그랜드 다낭 리조트는 모든 투숙객 여러분들의 행복하고 안전한 휴식을 위해 항상 최선을 다해 노력하고 있습니다. 그럼에도 불구하고 발생한 불편 사항에 대해, 전 직원들을 대표해 고개숙여 사과드립니다. 귀하께서 공유해 주신 내용들은 관련 팀들과 공유되었으며 최대한 빠른 시일 내에 개선방안을 마련하려 노력하고 있습니다. 화장실 냄새건은 내부 팬의 작동에 문제가 있는지 조사를 시작하였고, 수영장의 청소는 정규 3일 시행과 더불어 2019년부터 3대의 자동 클리닝 로봇을 24시간 가동할 예정임을 알려드립니다. 마지막으로, 버기카 서비스는 선착순으로 제공해드리는 것이 일반 규정이며 해당 사항이 지켜지지 않아 불편을 겪으신 것 같습니다. 다음과 같은 일이 두번 다시 발생하는 일이 없도록 현재 2대의 버기카를 추가 도입하는 과정중에 있으며, 이에 다시 한번 진심으로 사과드립니다. 추후 다낭에 재방문 하실때 꼭 저희의 발전한 모습을 보여드릴 수 있기를 고대합니다.

진심을 담아,
Shearaton Grand Danang Resort.

sample_comments.text: 우선 호이안 호텔중에는 꽤 비싼편입니다. 풀뷰로 추가금주고 예약해서 한화로 34-36만원 정도 준거같아요~ 수영장은 넓습니다. 넓은거 말고는 딱히 좋다고 할순없어요. 오후6시쯤 체크인했는데 지도만주시고 어떤 서비스 몇시까지 운영 이런거 안알려주셨구요. 수영장은 24시간 가능하다는 설명해주셔서 그날 7시반에갔는데 어두운거뿐만아니라 비치타월하나도 준비가 안되어있네요...가운 요청하려고 앞에 라플라주에 말씀드렸더니 호텔에 말하라고하네요...다행히 현지통화가능유심이라 전화로 요청했고 요청후 20분이상 지난후 객실 타월 받았습니다. 여기까지만 해도 서비스는 아시겠죠? 조식도 정말 기대많이했는데 종류도 너무 없고 실망스럽습니다. 메리어트 호텔을 좋아하는데 매우 실망했습니다.
